purpose: Assess which governance capabilities persist through interfaces vs which depend on Claude-session cognition. Identify formalization gaps.

sqo_cockpit_v2.continuity_status: OPERATIONAL — operator can see qualification state without session context

sqo_authority_workflow.continuity_status: OPERATIONAL — 12 actions available through governed mutation endpoint

capabilities: BOARDROOM governed narrative with proof-graph substrate
lens_v2.continuity_status: OPERATIONAL — structural intelligence accessible without session context

event_logs.continuity_status: OPERATIONAL — governance history reconstructable from logs

capabilities: Evidence object chain with lineage references

evidence_source_selection.description: Selecting which documentation to ingest as new evidence
evidence_source_selection.current_state: SESSION_DEPENDENT — requires Claude to read docs and identify structural relevance
evidence_source_selection.formalization_feasibility: FEASIBLE — evidence source catalog is a straightforward data structure

tier_challenge_identification.description: Identifying when new evidence challenges existing CEU classifications
tier_challenge_identification.current_state: PARTIALLY_SESSION_DEPENDENT — evidence delta artifact captures findings, but initial identification requires structural analysis
tier_challenge_identification.formalization_path: Automated tier consistency checker comparing evidence types against tier expectations
tier_challenge_identification.formalization_feasibility: FEASIBLE — rules-based: if evidence contains INFRASTRUCTURE keywords and tier is CONSUMER, flag for review

reclassification_reasoning.description: Deciding whether a tier challenge warrants reclassification
reclassification_reasoning.current_state: OPERATOR_GOVERNED — correctly session-dependent. This SHOULD require human judgment.
reclassification_reasoning.formalization_path: NOT RECOMMENDED for full automation. Persist the reasoning in event log (already done: RCEU-0042/43/44).
reclassification_reasoning.formalization_feasibility: N/A — this is a non-automatable boundary by design

learning_event_generation.description: Identifying patterns from reconciliation friction and converting to learning events
learning_event_generation.current_state: SESSION_DEPENDENT — requires Claude to observe patterns and articulate them
learning_event_generation.formalization_path: Structured friction capture during reconciliation (e.g., if reclassification occurs, auto-generate TIER_CLASSIFICATION_GAP learning event)
learning_event_generation.formalization_feasibility: FEASIBLE — trigger-based: specific governance actions (reclassify, refine, challenge) auto-generate PROPOSED learning events

cross_session_reasoning_continuity.description: Carrying analysis context from one Claude session to the next
cross_session_reasoning_continuity.current_state: PARTIALLY_MITIGATED — event logs, governance artifacts, and learning events persist reasoning. But the 'why did we look at this' context degrades.
cross_session_reasoning_continuity.formalization_path: Governance session log + persistent investigation state
cross_session_reasoning_continuity.formalization_feasibility: FEASIBLE — governance session artifacts (baseline_freeze, evidence_delta, replay_validation, learning_events) already form a persistent investigation trail

phase_7_continuity_improvements.improvement: Governance session artifacts (baseline_freeze, evidence_ingestion_delta, replay_validation, learning_events, operator_continuity_assessment)
phase_7_continuity_improvements.impact: New persistent governance investigation trail — a future session can reconstruct not just the state but the reasoning path
Reconciliation friction, evidence gaps, and operator corrections are now captured as governed learning events. Future cycles can consume PROMOTED events.
phase_7_continuity_improvements.status: IMPLEMENTED in this stream — lifecycle not yet validated (no PROPOSED → REVIEWED → PROMOTED cycle completed)

phase_7_continuity_improvements.improvement: Evidence ingestion delta as governed artifact
phase_7_continuity_improvements.impact: Evidence selection and reconciliation findings persist outside Claude-session memory

conclusion: Phase 7 demonstrates that the core governance loop — evidence ingestion, CEU reconciliation, reopen/refine, replay validation, learning capture — operates through persistent interfaces with reconstructable state. The primary remaining session dependency is evidence source selection and learning event generation, both of which are feasible to formalize through trigger-based automation. Reclassification decisions correctly remain operator-governed (non-automatable boundary).
